message:
test(ftui-extras): improve export.rs test coverage (bd-21qp3)

Add 50 new tests (35→85 total) covering HTML exporter (dim, strikethrough,
combined text-decoration, custom class prefix, custom fonts, CSS class
deduplication, multiple different styles, quote escape, default values),
SVG exporter (italic, dim, underline, strikethrough, transparent background,
cell bg rects, multiline, custom font, default values), Text/ANSI exporter
(dim, italic, underline, strikethrough, bg color, reset codes, no-trim mode,
multiline ANSI, empty styled cells), helper functions (html/svg escape empty
strings, svg quote passthrough, cell_content_str empty/continuation/char),
write_ansi_style (all 8 individual SGR flags, bg-only, all flags combined,
transparent fg skipped), and derive trait coverage for all exporter types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
